doc_title_en: Notice of Resolution on Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of Treasury Stock Pursuant to Article 156 of the Companies Act, as Applied by Restatement Under Article 165(3) of the Same Act)

key_facts.reason_jp: 株主還元及び資本効率の向上と機動的な資本政策を遂行するため

summary_en: 700,000 shares (2.40% of outstanding), ¥700M upper limit, open-market purchases on Tokyo Stock Exchange, June 1 – August 31, 2026. Stated purpose: shareholder returns and capital-efficiency improvement.
summary_jp: 700,000株（発行済株式2.40%）、上限7億円、東京証券取引所の市場買付、2026年6月1日～8月31日。目的：株主還元及び資本効率の向上。
tag_en: Buyback - 700,000 shares (2.40% S/O) - ¥700M - Open market - Jun–Aug 2026
tag_jp: 自社株買い - 70万株（発行済株式2.40%）- 7億円 - 市場買付 - 2026年6月～8月
